verification.build: gate_na: NS1001 execution pack assembles previously-verified release artifacts and evidence
verification.test: latest readiness/release reports are revalidated and copied into the execution pack with a sha256 manifest
verification.contractInvariant: execution pack must package release artifacts, checklist, and return templates without claiming isolated-machine execution or P001 closure
verification.hotspot: gate_na: this script does not execute isolated-machine install, teacher observation, printer/network/domain checks, or operator signoff

boundary: NS1001 execution pack closes the repo-side collection gap for isolated-machine rehearsal. It does not create real isolated-machine evidence, does not close P001, and does not advance P002.
next: Transfer the execution pack to the isolated machine, fill the return evidence, then run tools/run-ns1001-isolated-machine-evidence-import.ps1 after the pack returns to the repo host.
rollback: Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'D:\CODE\k12-question-graph\tmp\ns1001-execution-pack\20260608-013255' -Recurse -Force; git restore tasks/non-site-implementation-plan.csv tools/README.md; git clean -f -- tools/run-ns1001-isolated-machine-execution-pack.ps1 docs/evidence/20260608-ns1001-isolated-machine-execution-pack.json docs/templates/p001-isolated-machine-evidence-template.json
